evidence.test_command: python -m pytest tests/runtime/test_run_start_artifacts.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_replay.py tests/application/test_execution_pipeline_run_ledger.py tests/application/test_execution_pipeline_protocol_run_ledger.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_replay_isolation.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_support.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_policy_enforcement.py tests/application/test_skill_adapter_bindings.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_error_codes.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_error_code_adoption.py tests/platform/test_ring_import_boundary_policy.py tests/platform/test_dependency_policy_contract.py -q && python -m pytest tests/application/test_orchestrator_epic.py -k "build_turn_context_protocol_governed_defaults or build_turn_context_uses_active_run_policy_overrides or build_turn_context_protocol_determinism_invalid_network_mode_fails_fast" -q

implemented_now: protocol preflight rejects ring policy violations before execution with E_RING_POLICY_VIOLATION
protocol preflight rejects capability profile violations before execution with E_CAPABILITY_VIOLATION
protocol preflight rejects determinism policy mismatches before execution with E_DETERMINISM_POLICY_VIOLATION
protocol preflight rejects direct tool-to-tool invocation boundary violations with E_TOOL_INVOCATION_BOUNDARY
dispatcher runtime emits determinism_violation telemetry and fails with E_DETERMINISM_VIOLATION when declared pure tools expose side-effect signals
protocol error-code registry includes ring/capability/determinism/boundary families with descriptions
role/skill tool bindings carry explicit ring, determinism_class, capability_profile, and tool_contract_version defaults for pre-execution policy checks
turn context carries run_determinism_class and allowed capability/ring policy derived from active run contract artifacts and process rules
static ring import boundary governance check fails closed when compatibility/experimental paths import forbidden runtime internals
